headline: A year of Walmart Plus is half off ahead of Prime Day
summary: Walmart Plus annual subscription is currently half off at $49. The membership typically costs $98 per year. Perks include free delivery on orders over $35 and expedited shipping.

headline: Firefox’s new home page widgets are helping me focus
summary: Firefox is rolling out new customizable widgets for its home page. Features include sports scores, time zones, a focus timer, and a checklist. These additions are praised as some of the best new Firefox features in years.

headline: The Onion’s rebooted InfoWars is coming July 2nd
summary: The Onion's satirical InfoWars platform is set to launch on July 2nd. It will transform Alex Jones's former conspiracy network into a comedy and media platform. The reboot follows The Onion's acquisition plans announced over a year ago.

headline: Amazon employees say they’re facing termination for backing data center limits
summary: Amazon employees claim retaliation for testifying in favor of data center limits in Seattle. Three software engineers accused Amazon of breaking employment discrimination laws. They reported disciplinary action a week after their testimony.

headline: The Popular Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer Drops to the Lowest Price of the Year, Now Just $133
summary: The Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D printer is now available for its lowest price ever at $133. It's described as a reliable and highly moddable 3D printer. This deal is offered ahead of Amazon Prime Day.

headline: Bambu 3D Printers Are on Sale at Best Buy Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: Bambu 3D printers are currently on sale at Best Buy. The deals are available ahead of Amazon Prime Day. It's an opportune time for 3D printing enthusiasts to upgrade their equipment.

headline: Save $100 Off a Pair of BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: Get $100 off BowFlex Results Series SelectTech adjustable dumbbells. The discount is offered ahead of Amazon Prime Day. They can still be delivered by Father's Day with free shipping.

headline: The GTPLAYER Big and Tall Gaming Chair Drops to Less Than $160 Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: The GTPLAYER Big and Tall Gaming Chair is now priced under $160. This deal comes just before Amazon Prime Day. It's an ideal gift for big and tall dads, even if delivery is slightly delayed.

headline: Man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after boy injured in crocodile enclosure
summary: A man has been arrested on suspicion of attempted murder. A three-year-old boy was critically injured in a crocodile enclosure. The boy is now in stable condition at Addenbrooke's Hospital.

headline: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
summary: A US-Iran deal is prompting questions about the war's ultimate purpose. The human cost of the conflict remains undeniable. The Iranian regime has been empowered by the war, not just survived it.

headline: Teacher who murdered adopted baby son Preston Davey given whole life prison sentence
summary: A teacher received a whole life prison sentence for the murder of his adopted baby son. Preston Davey died after enduring months of abuse. Jamie Varley was found guilty of sexual and physical abuse.

headline: Moscow residents complain of black rain after largest Ukrainian attack hits oil refinery
summary: Moscow residents reported black rain following a major Ukrainian drone attack. Almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an oil refinery and shopping center. Fires erupted south-east of the Russian capital after the strikes.
